regional_cost_note: HVAC engineers in Rotorua typically charge $8,500–$20,000 for a residential ducted system and $150–$420/m² of conditioned space for commercial work. Rotorua rates are generally competitive — expect to pay near or slightly below the national average. HVAC work must comply with NZ Building Code G4 and NZBC F7 — use a licensed installer.
